name: Infinno Baby Wrist Rattle Socks and Foot Finder Set, Perfect Baby Toys for 0-12 Months Newborn Boys and Girls As Shower Gifts, Garden Bug Series
bullets: PROMOTE SENSORY EXPLORATION - The bright colorful rattle socks will promote baby sensory exploration through sight, touch and sound. Baby boys and girls will be encouraged to grab and reach the bright colorful wrist rattles and foot finders.

FIT COMFORTABLY - This set contains two soft wrist rattles and two foot finders. These bright colorful wrist rattles and foot finders fit easily and comfortably on baby's wrists and ankles. Extended straps allow for continued use as baby grows.
DELIGHTFUL BABY GIFT - Packaged in an exquisite gift box, this rattle socks set makes a delightful baby shower gift, and a baby registry must have for new mom.

LOUDER ENCHANTING RATTLE - The rattle socks and wrist rattles with contrasting patterns, bright colors and improved with louder enchanting rattle sound will stimulate baby vision, interaction and exploration.
SAFE AND SOFT COTTON MATERIALS - Baby-friendly soft materials are very safe for baby to touch and even chew.

reviews.name: Liz
reviews.title: Perfect baby gift!!
reviews.body: Really great distraction for the baby. Soft and cute. It's not too loud, just enough to get the baby's attention. Great quality and worth the buy. It's not rough, the material is very soft, it wouldn't hurt the baby's arms and legs.

reviews.name: BB
reviews.title: Sweet, playful gift for my great niece
reviews.body: I bought the Infinno Baby Wrist Rattle Socks and Foot Finder Set for my great niece, and it was such a sweet little gift. She looked so cute wearing them, and it was fun watching her react to the soft rattling sounds every time she moved her hands or feet.The material is soft and gentle, which made me feel good about her wearing them for extended periods. They’re comfortable, breathable, and…

reviews.name: Kalie Schuster
reviews.title: Cuteness overload
reviews.body: My almost 4 month old was very intrigued by these! He’s been very active with his feet but adding the wrist rattle added to his curiosity. Highly reccomend for the noise and color contrast! Sizing is adjustable - I have a pip squeak and was able to Velcro the wrist rattles on. Socks were big but stayed on just fine.

reviews.name: Nikki
reviews.title: Fun for the grandson
reviews.body: These are cute. My 3 month old grandson was very interested in them. Bright colors and a good first toy to learn how to hold and shake. His wrists are.too small right now to put them on him but he will grown into them.
